intro: Zygogynum umbellatum, commonly known as the Umbellate Zygogynum, is a plant species native to New Caledonia, belonging to the family Hernandiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that may help in reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues.
